text: The vibrant, futuristic lighting and glass walls evoke a sense of curiosity and anticipation within me. Here, the boundaries between thought and invention seem thin—something transformative is taking place. The display on research and development suggests a space dedicated to exploration and progress. I feel inspired, but also slightly alienated by the sterile, impersonal design. Still, I am drawn in, eager to contemplate the possibilities of human creativity and the ethical puzzles progress brings.
